label: PS-RV2272-SFS-ROOF-F

name: front/BBOX faceted 45-degree turtle shell roof; PTO side remains open
part_name: front/BBOX faceted 45-degree turtle shell roof; PTO side remains open
title: front/BBOX faceted 45-degree turtle shell roof; PTO side remains open
notes: Open at PTO/front. Use with optional front splash visor only; do not block PTO/E-stop access.

label: PS-RV2272-SFS-ROOF-R

name: rear/CBOX faceted 45-degree turtle shell roof; use with rear cap if clearance permits

title: rear/CBOX faceted 45-degree turtle shell roof; use with rear cap if clearance permits
notes: Rear side can be closed by REAR-CAP. Keep service access and drainage in mind.

label: PS-RV2272-SFS-REAR-CAP

name: optional faceted rear closure cap for CBOX side; includes lower drain notches
part_name: optional faceted rear closure cap for CBOX side; includes lower drain notches
title: optional faceted rear closure cap for CBOX side; includes lower drain notches
notes: Use on rear/CBOX end only. Do not fully seal if trapped mud/water cannot drain.

label: PS-RV2272-SFS-FRONT-VISOR

name: optional open PTO-side splash visor; sheds water but does not close the front

title: optional open PTO-side splash visor; sheds water but does not close the front
notes: Keep PTO side open. Use only if it does not interfere with unit attachment/removal.

label: PS-RV2272-SFS-SIDE-FLOAT-L
description: left detachable side sponson float; separate from roof and away from DRC/DRIVE
name: left detachable side sponson float; separate from roof and away from DRC/DRIVE

title: left detachable side sponson float; separate from roof and away from DRC/DRIVE

label: PS-RV2272-SFS-SIDE-FLOAT-R

name: right detachable side sponson float; separate from roof and away from DRC/DRIVE
part_name: right detachable side sponson float; separate from roof and away from DRC/DRIVE
title: right detachable side sponson float; separate from roof and away from DRC/DRIVE

label: PS-RV2272-SFS-MCR-CLAMP-S

name: loose retrofit U-clamp for MCR rail / shell dry fit
part_name: loose retrofit U-clamp for MCR rail / shell dry fit
title: loose retrofit U-clamp for MCR rail / shell dry fit
notes: Prototype clamp. Verify actual printed rail size and do not crush waterproof boxes.

label: PS-RV2272-SFS-FLT-RCV-SADDLE-S

name: printable adapter saddle for existing FLT-RCV receiver; side-float mount

title: printable adapter saddle for existing FLT-RCV receiver; side-float mount

title: 8/10/12 mm clearance gauge for DRC/DRIVE and tire sweep dry-fit checks
